workflow_interpretation: Name the cash-flow metric used in the thesis.
OCF trend should be separated from one-time working-capital effects.
Capex intensity determines whether FCF is durable.
Working-capital release can inflate short-term FCF.
High non-cash addbacks can weaken per-share cash-flow quality.
FCF margin must be compared with revenue growth and reinvestment needs.
Conversion from earnings to FCF should be explainable.
FCF per share can be distorted by leverage or buybacks.
One strong quarter is insufficient for a long-term thesis.
Define the next cash-flow event that changes confidence.
